title: Smoky Roasted Dutch Soya Roast
description: A hearty and earthy Dutch dish featuring soya milk and roast, perfect for a low-carb dinner option, evoking nostalgic feelings with its crunchy texture and smoky flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soya milk, olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the chopped onion, sliced mushrooms, and cauliflower florets to the bowl and toss to coat with the soya milk mixture.
Spread the mixture out in a single layer on a large baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and sprinkle the grated grana padano cheese over the top.
Return the baking sheet to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the Smoky Roasted Dutch Soya Roast from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
